API docs by Redocly

REST API of Marmot Server (0.1.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

auth

Login and issue access token

Request Body schema: application/json
required
userId
required
string
password
required
string <password>

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/auth/login

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "string",
  • "password": "pa$$word"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "accessToken": "string",
  • "tokenType": "Bearer",
  • "expiresIn": 0,
  • "refreshToken": "string",
  • "mustChangePassword": true,
  • "user": {
    • "apiVersion": "string",
    • "kind": "string",
    • "metadata": {
      • "id": "string",
      • "nodeName": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "uuid": "string",
      • "key": "string",
      • "instanceName": "string",
      • "comment": "string",
      • "labels": {
        • "key1": "value1",
        • "key2": "value2"
        }
      },
    • "spec": {
      • "enabled": true,
      • "mustChangePassword": true,
      • "email": "string",
      • "passwordHash": "string",
      • "roles": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "comment": "string"
      },
    • "status": {
      • "lastLoginAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "passwordUpdatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "lockedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "lockedUntil": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "apiKeyCount": 0
      }
    }
}

Logout current session

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/auth/logout

Response samples

  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": 0,
  • "message": "string"
}

Get current authenticated user

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/auth/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "mustChangePassword": true,
  • "roles": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

user

Create a user

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
apiVersion
required
string
kind
required
string
required
object (Metadata)
required
object (UserSpec)
object (UserStatus)

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/users

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

BearerAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
currentPassword
string <password>
newPassword
required
string <password>

Responses

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/users/{userId}/password

  • "newPassword": "pa$$word"
}

application/json
{
  • "code": 0,

}

List API keys issued by a user

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
string

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/users/{userId}/apikeys

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "apiVersion": "string",
    • "kind": "string",
    • "metadata": {
      • "id": "string",
      • "nodeName": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "uuid": "string",
      • "key": "string",
      • "instanceName": "string",
      • "comment": "string",
      • "labels": {
        • "key1": "value1",
        • "key2": "value2"
        }
      },
    • "spec": {
      • "comment": "string",
      • "tokenPrefix": "string",
      • "issuedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "expiresAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "revoked": true,
      • "sessionType": "string"
      },
    • "status": {
      • "lastUsedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "revokedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    }
]

Create an API key for a user

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
comment
string
expiresAt
string <date-time>
sessionType
string

Session scope for the API key. Login sessions may be revoked automatically after inactivity; generated keys remain persistent until explicitly deleted.

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/users/{userId}/apikeys

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "comment": "string",
  • "expiresAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "sessionType": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "apiVersion": "string",
  • "kind": "string",
  • "metadata": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "nodeName": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "uuid": "string",
    • "key": "string",
    • "instanceName": "string",
    • "comment": "string",
    • "labels": {
      • "key1": "value1",
      • "key2": "value2"
      }
    },
  • "spec": {
    • "comment": "string",
    • "tokenPrefix": "string",
    • "issuedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "expiresAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "revoked": true,
    • "sessionType": "string"
    },
  • "status": {
    • "lastUsedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "revokedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

authz

Check authorization for an action

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
userId
string
resource
required
string
resourceId
string
action
required
string
object

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/authz/check

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "string",
  • "resource": "string",
  • "resourceId": "string",
  • "action": "string",
  • "context": { }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "allowed": true,
  • "reason": "string",
  • "matchedRoles": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

application/json

    • "logicalVolume": "string",
    • "size": 0,
    • "path": "string",
    • "osVariant": "string",
    • "persistent": true
    }
}

Info for a specific volume

path Parameters
volumeId
required
string

The id of the volume to retrieve

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/volume/{volumeId}

Update Volume

path Parameters
volumeId
required
string

The id of the volume to update

Request Body schema: application/json
apiVersion
required
string
kind
required
string
required
object (Metadata)
object (Status)
required
object (VolSpec)

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/volume/{volumeId}

    • "logicalVolume": "string",
    • "size": 0,
    • "path": "string",
    • "osVariant": "string",
    • "persistent": true
    }
}

server

Create Virtual Server

Create a new virtual server. The virtual server specifications are specified in the request body. If the virtual server is successfully created, the information of the created virtual server is returned in the response. The virtual server is then automatically started. The virtual server specifications include CPU, memory, storage, network settings, and more. If an error occurs during virtual server creation, an appropriate error message is returned.

Request Body schema: application/json
apiVersion
required
string
kind
required
string
required
object (Metadata)
required
object (ServerSpec)
object (Status)

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/server

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "apiVersion": "string",

Get Server Information

Retrieve information about existing virtual servers. A list of virtual servers is returned in the response. Each virtual server's information includes server ID, status, resource usage, and more. If no virtual servers exist or an error occurs while retrieving information, an appropriate error message is returned.

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/server

  • default

Delete Server

path Parameters
id
required
string

The id of the server to delete

Responses

Marmot Server API

  • "message": "string"

network

Create Virtual Network

Create a new virtual network. The virtual network specifications are specified in the request body. If the virtual network is successfully created, the information of the created virtual network is returned in the response. The virtual network specifications include network name, IP address range, DHCP settings, and more. If an error occurs during virtual network creation, an appropriate error message is returned.

Request Body schema: application/json
apiVersion
required
string
kind
required
string
required
object (Metadata)
required
object (VirtualNetworkSpec)
object (Status)

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/network

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "apiVersion": "string",
  • "kind": "string",
  • "metadata": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "nodeName": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "uuid": "string",
    • "key": "string",
    • "instanceName": "string",
    • "comment": "string",
    • "labels": {
      • "key1": "value1",
      • "key2": "value2"
      }
    },
  • "spec": {
    • "forwardMode": "string",
    • "bridgeName": "string",
    • "macAddress": "string",
    • "stp": true,
    • "ipAddress": "string",
    • "netmask": "string",
    • "dhcp": true,
    • "dhcpStartAddress": "string",
    • "dhcpEndAddress": "string",
    • "nat": true,
    • "ipNetworkId": "string",
    • "iPNetworkAddress": "string",
    • "vpnAccess": true,
    • "overlayMode": "none",
    • "vni": 16777215,
    • "underlayInterface": "string",
    • "peerPolicy": "auto"
    },
  • "status": {
    • "statusCode": 0,
    • "status": "string",
    • "creationTimeStamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "deletionTimeStamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "lastUpdateTimeStamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "message": "string",
    • "console": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "message": "string"
}

Get Network Information

Retrieve information about existing virtual networks. A list of virtual networks is returned in the response. Each virtual network's information includes network ID, status, IP address range, DHCP settings, and more. If no virtual networks exist or an error occurs while retrieving information, an appropriate error message is returned.

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/network

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "apiVersion": "string",
  • "kind": "string",
  • "metadata": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "nodeName": "string",
    • "name": "string",

    • "ipAddress": "string",
    • "netmask": "string",

Request Body schema: application/json
apiVersion
required
string
kind
required
string

object (Metadata)
required
object (ApplicationLoadBalancerSpec)
object (Status)

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/application-load-balancer

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "apiVersion": "string",
  • "kind": "string",
  • "metadata": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "nodeName": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "uuid": "string",
    • "key": "string",
    • "instanceName": "string",
    • "comment": "string",
    • "labels": {
      • "key1": "value1",
      • "key2": "value2"
      }
    },
  • "spec": {
    • "bindPublicNetworkName": "string",
    • "bindPublicIpAddress": "string",
    • "routes": [
      • {
        • "to": "string",
        • "via": "string"
        }
      ],
    • "internalVirtualNetwork": "string",
    • "remoteCIDR": "string",
    • "listeners": [
      • {
        • "name": "string",
        • "protocol": "string",
        • "vipPort": 0,
        • "backendPort": 0,
        • "backendSelector": {
          • "matchLabels": {
            • "property1": "string",
            • "property2": "string"
            }
          },
        • "loadBalancingAlgorithm": "string",
        • "healthCheck": {
          • "enabled": true,
          • "path": "string",
          • "intervalSeconds": 0,
          • "timeoutSeconds": 0,
          • "healthyThreshold": 0,
          • "unhealthyThreshold": 0
          },
        • "sessionPersistence": {
          • "enabled": true,
          • "cookieName": "string"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
  • "status": {
    • "statusCode": 0,
    • "status": "string",
    • "creationTimeStamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "deletionTimeStamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "lastUpdateTimeStamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

    • "console": "string"
    }
}

      • "deletionTimeStamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "lastUpdateTimeStamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "message": "string",
      • "console": "string"
      }
    }
]

id
required
string

application/json

ipnetwork

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/ipnetwork

  • default
Content type
application/json
[

    • "netmask": "string",
    • "netmasklen": 0,
    • "gateway": "string",
    • "routes": [
      • {
        • "to": "string",
        • "via": "string"
        }
      ],
    • "nameservers": {
      • "addresses": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "search": [
        • "string"
        ]
      }
    }
]

Get assigned IP addresses for a specific IP network

Retrieve the list of assigned IP addresses for a specific IP network.

path Parameters
id
required
string

The ID of the IP network.

Responses

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/ipnetwork/{id}/addresses

  • default
Content type
application/json
[

    • "networkId": "string",
    • "ipAddress": "string",
    • "netmask": "string",
    • "hostId": "string"
    }
]

Get IP networks for a virtual network

Retrieve the list of IP networks assigned to a specific virtual network.

path Parameters
id
required
string

The ID of the virtual network.

Responses

        • "string"
        ],
      • "search": [
        • "string"
        ]
      }
    }
]

marmot

Get Marmot Host Status

Retrieve the status of the marmot host node, including resource capacity and current allocation. Capacity includes CPU cores, memory, disk count and capacity, and network interfaces. Allocation includes running/stopped VM counts, allocated CPU cores and memory (excluding stopped VMs), and virtual network count.

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/marmot/status

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nodeName": "string",
  • "hostId": "string",
  • "ipAddress": "string",
  • "initiatorId": "string",
  • "iscsiServer": true,
  • "capacity": {
    • "cpuCores": 0,
    • "memoryMB": 0,
    • "diskCount": 0,
    • "diskCapacityGB": 0,
    • "networkInterfaces": [
      • "string"
      ]
    },
  • "allocation": {
    • "totalVMs": 0,
    • "runningVMs": 0,
    • "stoppedVMs": 0,
    • "allocatedCpuCores": 0,
    • "allocatedMemoryMB": 0,
    • "virtualNetworks": 0
    },
  • "lastUpdated": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Get Marmot Cluster Status

Retrieve host status for all cluster members. Each item includes node name, host id, resource capacity and allocation.

Responses

Marmot Server API

http://0.0.0.0:{port}{basePath}/marmot/cluster

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "nodeName": "string",
    • "hostId": "string",
    • "ipAddress": "string",
    • "initiatorId": "string",
    • "iscsiServer": true,
    • "capacity": {
      • "cpuCores": 0,
      • "memoryMB": 0,
      • "diskCount": 0,
      • "diskCapacityGB": 0,
      • "networkInterfaces": [
        • "string"
        ]
      },
    • "allocation": {
      • "totalVMs": 0,
      • "runningVMs": 0,
      • "stoppedVMs": 0,
      • "allocatedCpuCores": 0,
      • "allocatedMemoryMB": 0,
      • "virtualNetworks": 0
      },
    • "lastUpdated": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]
